nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 戈納夫島
nodes.summary: 戈納夫島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括中美夜鹰、Eastern chat-tanager，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: Eastern chat-tanager
nodes.summary: Eastern chat-tanager（Eastern chat-tanager，学名 Calyptophilus frugivorus），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于戈納夫島，常见栖息地包括山地森林、灌丛，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: abbotti was found on Gonâve Island off the west coast of Haiti but is also believed to be extinct since the early 1980s; however, a lack of extensive surveys on the island means the subspecies potentially survives. In the Dominican Republic, the species inhabits dense undergrowth in montane forest, especially in ravines and along streams

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: abbotti was found on Gonâve Island off the west coast of Haiti but is also believed to be extinct since the early 1980s; however, a lack of extensive surveys on the island means the subspecies potentially survives. In the Dominican Republic, the species inhabits dense undergrowth in montane forest, especially in ravines and along streams

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: abbottis habitat on Gonâve was semi-arid scrublands near sea level

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The main threats are logging and conversion of habitat to agriculture. It is considered rare to locally common, but " relatively little of the species' habitat lies within protected areas"
